implementation: Use core components View Text Image TouchableOpacity
Use StyleSheet.create for optimized styles
Use Flexbox for layout (default is column)
Use FlatList for long lists (virtualized)
Use SectionList for grouped data
Use React Navigation for routing
Organize by screens and components
Use useState useEffect same as React web
Use Zustand or Redux for global state
Use Platform.OS or .select for platform code
Use Image with proper sizing and resizeMode
example: <Image source={{ uri }} style={{ width height }} resizeMode="cover" />

implementation: Use Pressable for advanced touch feedback
Use KeyboardAvoidingView for forms
Use SafeAreaView for notches and safe areas
Use controlled TextInput with onChangeText
Use ScrollView for scrollable content (not lists)
Load data in useEffect with cleanup
Use react-native-vector-icons or expo-icons
Use expo-font or custom font loading
Use Dimensions or useWindowDimensions
Use Animated API or Reanimated for animations
Memoize components and callbacks
Add accessibility props to interactive elements
Use Modal component for overlays
Use AsyncStorage for persistent data
